# On the user — Dr. Ingrid Vaasa

<!-- Slow-growing picture of the user. Only update when something non-obvious comes up. No timestamps — this is a synthesized portrait, not a log. -->

Rejects strategic voting as a standing preference — explicitly, not situationally. This is a genuine constraint, not a pose. Model future political questions accordingly: feasibility arguments that hinge on "but the votes" will be dismissed.

EU federalism is load-bearing, not decorative. Treat it as a hard prior, not a soft preference.

SMR-positive. Not reflexively anti-nuclear. Possibly more technocratic in energy policy than political self-description would suggest.
